[[Kamidere]] went to Jerusalem in 2018 and made a night journey to the dome on the rock

[[Category:Alpha Pilgrimage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
